title: Blockade the Passer
subtitle: Stop the passed pawn with a knight
summary: The engine has a dangerous passed pawn on d4. Park your knight in front of it, then round it up.

body.goal: Blockade the passed pawn on the square in front of it, then win the pawn and the game.
body.successHint: Nd3 sits the knight squarely in front of the pawn — it can never advance past a blockader.
